info.name: Gamma Public API
info.description:
Complete collection for the Gamma Public API with example requests at varying complexity levels.

Authentication: Add your API key to the collection variable `api_key`, or set the `X-API-KEY` header on each request.

variable.description: API base URL. Use https://api.staging.gamma.app for staging.
Set automatically after creating a generation

request.description: Simplest possible request. Only the two required fields: `inputText` and `textMode`. Gamma picks all defaults (presentation format, 10 cards, auto card split, AI-generated images, default theme).

item.name: Create generation — with format and theme

request.description: Adds format, card count, theme, and text options. Replace `themeId` with a real ID from the List themes request.

item.name: Create generation — with images and card options

request.description: Uses `inputTextBreaks` card splitting with `\n---\n` separators, AI image generation with a named `stylePreset`, fixed 16:9 dimensions, and additional instructions.

item.name: Create generation — full options with header/footer and sharing

request.description: Kitchen-sink example using every parameter: text options, AI images, 16:9 with header/footer (logo, confidential text, card numbers), sharing with email recipients, folder assignment, PDF export, and additional instructions.
Document format with pageless layout, extensive text, no images. Good for internal docs and guides.
Social media carousel (4:5 for Instagram/LinkedIn) with PNG export, preserved text, and AI images.
Uses `condense` mode to summarize long content into a brief presentation with Pictographic images.
Provides image URLs inline in `inputText` with `noImages` source so Gamma uses only the provided URLs. Uses `preserve` mode and `inputTextBreaks` for precise card control.
Poll this endpoint after creating a generation. The `generation_id` variable is set automatically by the create requests. Status will be `pending`, `completed`, or `failed`.

item.name: Generate from Template
item.description: Create content from an existing Gamma template.

request.description: Minimal template generation. The template Gamma must have exactly one page. Replace `gammaId` with a real template ID.
Template generation with theme override, AI image options, sharing, folder placement, and PPTX export.
Returns all themes available to the workspace, including standard and custom themes. Use the `id` from the response in the `themeId` parameter of generation requests.
Searches themes by name. Try different terms like 'minimal', 'bold', 'dark', etc.
Paginated theme listing. Use `nextCursor` from the response as the `after` parameter for the next page.
Returns all folders the authenticated user is a member of. Use the `id` from the response in the `folderIds` parameter of generation requests.
